title: chrony bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.6.1-2.0.1]
- Fixed chrony starting before network-online service [Orabug: 36813717]
- Change chrony.conf to use pool.ntp.org [Orabug: 28627760]

[4.6.1-2]
- improve description of refresh directive (RHEL-82096)
- improve logging of selection failures (RHEL-80388 RHEL-80413 RHEL-80415)
- fix sourcedir reloading to not multiply sources (RHEL-95016)
- switch from patchX to patch -P X
full_text:
[4.6.1-2.0.1]
- Fixed chrony starting before network-online service [Orabug: 36813717]
- Change chrony.conf to use pool.ntp.org [Orabug: 28627760]

[4.6.1-2]
- improve description of refresh directive (RHEL-82096)
- improve logging of selection failures (RHEL-80388 RHEL-80413 RHEL-80415)
- fix sourcedir reloading to not multiply sources (RHEL-95016)
- switch from patchX to patch -P X

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20571-0.html
